title: Any Progress on Keyboard Shortcuts to Switch Between Board Views?
excerpt: ^I saw this post that ended in 2021 - can we add shortcuts to move between board views? I frequently switch between the Gantt, Timeline, and Table views, many times a day. CTRL+B is useful for switching between boards. …

posts.author: hkjohn (jawn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Keyboard Shortcut for Board Views Platform discussions
Starting to explore the functionality of the Online Docs and really enjoying it. However, ss there a keyboard shortcut for the views in the board?

^I saw this post that ended in 2021 - can we add shortcuts to move between board views? I frequently switch between the Gantt, Timeline, and Table views, many times a day. CTRL+B is useful for switching between boards.
